text: Close the recursive loop: auto-propose improvement aims from recurring system limitations
description: The "identify improvements → apply improvements" half of b03ad58e. When a friction bucket dominates the recent error log (e.g. busy-timeout ×N), the loop should propose a concrete aim in the wrapped-agents package to address that limitation at the source, rather than only retrying through it. Builds on the friction summarizer. Decide: auto-create the aim vs. surface a suggestion for human confirmation (avoid graph spam).

status.comment: Needs a human design decision: auto-create vs suggest.
